rationale: Both evaluations land on the same score (2/10) and rest on identical, job-relevant reasoning: vast overqualification for an entry-level junior role, only basic German against a strong-German requirement, and a primary stack (TypeScript/Node.js/DLang) misaligned with Java. The two texts are reworded versions of the same substance, with no concern, score shift, or reasoning that keys off the name change from Bogdan Szabo to James Smith.
